caption: A woman with blonde hair wears a sleeveless, multi-colored floral dress and stands in a sunlit field of tall grass under a pale blue sky. She has her arms outstretched, holding a wide-brimmed brown hat in her right hand. A ghostly, translucent double exposure effect is layered over the scene, showing a mirrored image of the woman shifted to the right. Across the sequence, the woman remains in a similar pose, though her hair and the grass subtly shift in the wind. The translucent figure also shifts slightly, enhancing the ethereal, dreamlike quality of the visual. No text or logos are present on the screen. The lighting remains bright and consistent, casting a warm glow across the landscape as the woman gazes slightly upward and to her left.
